orders.display_name: IV_fluid: Crystalloid 30 mL/kg bolus within 3 hours
antipyretic: Acetaminophen 1000mg IV q6h PRN temp >= 38.5
DVT_prophylaxis: Enoxaparin 2000IU SC daily (hold if coagulopathy)
stress_ulcer_prophylaxis: Famotidine 20mg IV BID or PPI
foley_catheter: Strict I/O monitoring, target UO >= 0.5 mL/kg/h

orders.clinical_intent: Home medication (continue): E11.9 - Sliding scale insulin
Home medication (continue): J45 - Salbutamol inhaler PRN
